summary: RR0-REPOSITORY-STATE-RECONCILIATION-001 is CLOSED after independent QA ACCEPT, both required PR checks passed, and PR #243 entered origin/main at ed190945a271252f9db32173c98d0bd1ffe86af7. RR0-PRODUCTION-FIXTURE-NOOP-AUDIT-001 is the next READY R0 task.

tests_run.result: PR #243 is MERGED with merge commit ed190945; Quality/Web/Browser Smoke and Windows Desktop Smoke Artifact both concluded SUCCESS.
Accepted branch head is an ancestor of origin/main.
The retained M7 renderer worktree still has 20 status entries and was not modified or deleted by reconciliation.

decisions.decision: Mark RR0-REPOSITORY-STATE-RECONCILIATION-001 CLOSED only after the accepted work actually entered origin/main.
Set RR0-PRODUCTION-FIXTURE-NOOP-AUDIT-001 to READY and reuse the controlled RR0 worktree rather than creating another worktree.

risks.summary: The original M7 renderer worktree remains dirty by design, retained as non-active evidence, and must not be treated as integrated product behavior.
Twenty-one local branches were not proven merged during inventory, so no branch was deleted automatically.

requested_action: Integrate this closure checkpoint, then start RR0-PRODUCTION-FIXTURE-NOOP-AUDIT-001 in the same controlled RR0 worktree with one systems_architect writer.
